desc: Chronological age of the individual in years.
Classification of the subject's employment sector or occupational engagement status.
Estimated number of individuals in the target population represented by the sample record.
Highest categorical level of educational attainment completed by the individual.
Highest educational attainment expressed as total years of formal schooling.

Categorization of the individual's occupation or professional activity.
Familial relationship of the individual to the household reference person.
Self-reported race or ethnic category of the individual.
Monetary gains from investment sources, excluding wage earnings, expressed as a continuous variable.
Monetary losses from investment sources, expressed as a continuous variable.
Average number of hours worked per week.
Country of origin or birth of the individual.
Binary indicator denoting whether annual income exceeds a predefined high-income threshold.
